KVK açıklaması

The Software Development program provides training in the programming languages and software lifecycle required for developing mobile, desktop, and web-based applications. The program focuses on core topics such as algorithmic logic, object-oriented programming, and database management.

Employment Opportunities

Graduates can work in IT companies as software developers, application support specialists, testing professionals, or technical project support staff.
